prompt: Implement pipeline_cycles(instructions, stages, issue_width, stalls). For an in-order ideal pipeline, empty work takes zero cycles; otherwise cycles are stages-1 plus ceil(instructions/issue_width), plus all explicit non-negative stall penalties. Validate that instructions is non-negative and stages and issue_width are positive integers.
instruction: Implement pipeline_cycles(instructions, stages, issue_width, stalls). For an in-order ideal pipeline, empty work takes zero cycles; otherwise cycles are stages-1 plus ceil(instructions/issue_width), plus all explicit non-negative stall penalties. Validate that instructions is non-negative and stages and issue_width are positive integers.
